cover.subtitle:
대대로·정사암·화백,
세 나라 세 회의.
cover.imagePrompt: Three Kingdoms governance illustration, 6th century. ONE Silla nobleman figure in deep purple official robe seated cross-legged at a low lacquer desk, brush poised over a rank-color silk strip. Behind him a folding screen showing 17-rank palette in faint stripes. Background: stone palace courtyard. Composition: deliberative, scholarly. Color: deep purple + gold + ink-black + jade. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.sub: 백제, 바위에 이름 써 재상 선출

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 회의 명칭(제가·정사암·화백)과 수상(대대로·상좌평·상대등)을 섞어서 묻는다. '선거로 뽑는 대대로'와 '바위에 이름 쓰는 정사암'을 헷갈리지 말 것. 골품제는 신라 전용임도 잊지 말 것.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized official cap (gat-style nobleman headwear) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small standing rock (jeongsaam) silhouette with brush propped against it. Cream #F2EDE3 base + deep purple #6B4F8A accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
